title: EN 1992-1-1:2004 Concrete Durability Calculator
description: Calculator of the concrete nominal cover and minimum concrete class.

corrossion_environment.description: Primary Environmental Exposure Class for Durability. Symbol: Exposure1. Environmental exposure classes in accordance with EN 206-1.

attack_environment.description: Secondary Environmental Exposure Class for Attack. Symbol: Exposure2. Environmental exposure classes for chemical/physical attack in accordance with EN 206-1.

slabGeometry.description: Reinforcement Position Independent of Geometry?. Symbol: SG. Enable when the position of the reinforcement is not affected by the construction process (i.e. a slab geometry)

annex.description: National Annex. Symbol: NA. Select custom to define specific nationally determined parameters.

delta_c_dev.description: Δcdev. Symbol: Δc_{dev}. Units: mm. Deviation allowance for nominal cover.

delta_c_dur_gamma.description: Δcdur,γ. Symbol: Δc_{dur,γ}. Units: mm. Reduction due to additive safety element.

delta_c_dur_st.description: Δcdur,st. Symbol: Δc_{dur,st}. Units: mm. Reduction of minimum cover for use of stainless steel.

delta_c_dur_add.description: Δcdur,add. Symbol: Δc_{dur,add}. Units: mm. Reduction of minimum cover for use of additional protection.

concrete_strength_class.description: Concrete Strength Class. Symbol: Class. Select the concrete strength class for the footing.

concrteteProtection.description: Concrete Protection?. Symbol: CP. Enable when protective coatings or any other environment protection measure is used.

specialQuality.description: Special Quality Control?. Symbol: SQC. Enable when special quality control is used for concrete production.

largeAggregate.description: Maximum Aggregate Size is Greater 32mm?. Symbol: LA. Enable when the aggregate is greater than 32mm.

max_reinforcement_diameter.description: Maximum Diameter of Reinforcement. Symbol: φ_{max}. Units: mm. Enter the equivalent diameter for bundle bars or the duct diameter for prestressing tendons.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
